_doc: Seed-and-track hypotheses. Each is a named thesis with conditions; the engine tracks when it fires and (later) whether it called the turn. Edit freely — add your own. Conditions AND together. rotation_stage matches the rotation engine's stage. Factors are macro.json factor names.

hypotheses.name: euphoria_sequence_stage1_meme
hypotheses.thesis: SOL diverging from BTC (meme season) is the first leg toward a euphoric top

hypotheses.name: euphoria_sequence_stage2_alt
hypotheses.thesis: Both SOL and ETH diverging (alt season) means we're mid-to-late in the run to the top

hypotheses.name: euphoria_blowoff
hypotheses.thesis: Both alts diverging hard while BTC extended = blow-off zone

hypotheses.name: classic_top_froth
hypotheses.thesis: Extreme greed + funding blown out + BTC stretched = classic top froth

hypotheses.name: generational_bottom
hypotheses.thesis: Extreme fear + BTC at/below 200wk floor = generational accumulation
